sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1
items.html: Matei [expanding] indicates the expansion of the upper light to the Sefira; not Matei indicates departure of the light from the Sefira.
